title.en: Sweet potato cultivation — all zones except arid
title.si: බතල වගාව — වියළිතම කලාප හැර සියල්ල
title.ta: சர்க்கரை வள்ளிக்கிழங்கு பயிர்ச்செய்கை — வறட்சி வலயம் தவிர்த்த அனைத்தும்

summary.en: HORDI recommendation for sweet potato (Ipomoea batatas). 12 released varieties including Wariyapola Red, CARI-9, Wariyapola White, Shanthi, Chithra, Gannoruwa White, Ama, Dawala, HORDI Malee, Ranabima. Temperature 20–40 °C; sandy loam with good drainage. Two spacing options: ridge-and-furrow 90 × 20 cm (55,000–60,000 cuttings/ha) or bed system 60 cm wide × 20 cm plant spacing. Two-stage fertilizer. Harvest 3–4 months. Yield 15–25 t/ha. Sweet potato weevil is the dominant pest.
summary.si: බතල (Ipomoea batatas) සඳහා HORDI නිර්දේශය. වාරියපොල රතු, CARI-9, වාරියපොල සුදු, ශාන්ති ආදී ප්‍රභේද 12ක්. තාපය 20-40 °C; හොඳ ජල බැස යෑමක් ඇති වැලි ලෝම. හෙක්ටයාරයකට කැපුම් 55,000-60,000. මාස 3-4 කින් අස්වනු. අස්වැන්න ටොන් 15-25/හෙ.
summary.ta: சர்க்கரை வள்ளிக்கிழங்கு (Ipomoea batatas) பயிர்ச்செய்கைக்கான HORDI பரிந்துரை. வாரியபொல சிவப்பு, CARI-9, வாரியபொல வெள்ளை, சாந்தி உள்ளிட்ட 12 வகைகள். வெப்பநிலை 20-40 °C; நல்ல வடிகால் கொண்ட மணல் களிமண். ஹெக்டேருக்கு 55,000-60,000 வெட்டுக்கள். 3-4 மாதங்களில் அறுவடை. மகசூல் 15-25 டன்/ஹெக்டேர்.

body.en: Sandy loam with good drainage. Temperature range 20–40 °C — grows everywhere except arid zone. Prepare either ridge-and-furrow (90 cm between ridges) or bed system (60 cm bed width).
Plant 55,000–60,000 cuttings/ha. Ridge+furrow spacing: 90 cm between rows × 20 cm between plants. Bed system: 20 cm between plants on the 60 cm bed.

name.en: Sweet potato vine cuttings (one of 12 released varieties)

body.en: Harvest 3–4 months after planting. Yield 15–25 t/ha. Cure tubers in shade 5–7 days before grading.

notes.en: Sweet potato weevil (Cylas formicarius) is the dominant pest — larvae tunnel into tubers rendering them unmarketable. Management: plant weevil-free vine cuttings; hill soil around stems; crop rotation 2+ years; collect and destroy infested tubers. No fully effective chemical cure; focus on cultural + sanitation.
Collar rot / root rot caused by Fusarium species. Remove diseased plants; avoid waterlogging; rotate away from sweet potato + other Ipomoea for 2+ years.
